briefdescription.para: Update the dashboards of all databrowsers.
Update the dashboards of the given sweepbrowser/databrowser.

memberdef.argsstring: (variable anaFuncType, variable passed, wave numericalValues, WaveText textualValues, variable sweepNo, variable headstage, variable ongoingDAQ)
memberdef.name: AD_GetResultMessage

briefdescription.para: Get result list of analysis function runs.
Return an appropriate error message for why PSQ_SQUARE_PULSE failed.

memberdef.argsstring: (wave numericalValues, WaveText textualValues, variable sweepNo, variable headstage)
memberdef.name: AD_GetDAScaleFailMsg

briefdescription.para: Return an appropriate error message for why PSQ_DA_SCALE failed.

memberdef.argsstring: (wave numericalValues, WaveText textualValues, variable sweepNo, variable headstage)

briefdescription.para: Return an appropriate error message for why PSQ_RAMP failed.

memberdef.argsstring: (wave numericalValues, WaveText textualValues, variable sweepNo, variable headstage)

briefdescription.para: Return an appropriate error message for why PSQ_RHEOBASE failed.

memberdef.argsstring: (wave numericalValues, WaveText textualValues, variable sweepNo, variable headstage)
memberdef.name: AD_GetPipetteInBathFailMsg

memberdef.argsstring: (wave numericalValues, wave textualValues, variable sweepNo, variable headstage)
memberdef.name: AD_GetSpikeControlFailMsg

memberdef.argsstring: (wave numericalValues, WaveText textualValues, variable sweepNo, variable headstage)
memberdef.name: AD_GetChirpFailMsg

briefdescription.para: Return an appropriate error message for why PSQ_CHIRP failed.

memberdef.name: AD_GetBaselineFailMsg

briefdescription.para: Return an appropriate error message if the baseline QC failed for the given sweep, or an empty string otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (variable anaFuncType, wave numericalValues, variable sweepNo, variable headstage, variable chunk, string subkey, string testname)
memberdef.name: AD_GetBaselineChunkFailMsg

memberdef.argsstring: (variable anaFuncType, wave numericalValues, WaveText textualValues, variable refSweepNo, variable headstage, variable numRequiredPasses=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: AD_GetPerSweepFailMessage

briefdescription.para: Gather per sweep failure information for some analysis function types.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, defaults to off] allows to determine the set failure state by not having reached enough passing sets

briefdescription.para: Show the sweeps of the given index entry into the listbox.
Plot the inner/outer bounds for PSQ_CHIRP

detaileddescription.para: Requires that the sweep is displayed.

briefdescription.para: AD Dashboard for pass/fail style analysis functions
